# CarbonWise

> AI-powered personal carbon coach. Measure, simulate, and reduce your carbon footprint with personalized habits and gamified progress.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Landing page introducing CarbonWise.
- [Onboarding](/onboarding): Build your sustainability profile.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Carbon intelligence dashboard.
- [AI Coach](/coach): Personal AI sustainability mentor.
- [What-If Simulator](/simulator): Project the impact of lifestyle changes.
- [Habits](/habits): Daily eco-action tracker.
- [Challenges](/challenges): Guided multi-day missions.
- [Community](/community): Leaderboards and collective milestones.
- [Reports](/reports): Weekly and monthly briefings.
- [Bill Scanner](/scan): AI receipt & bill analyzer.
- [Learn](/learn): Climate education center.
